name: PostgreSQL Version Upgrade
description: Upgrade PostgreSQL database to a newer major version with minimal downtime

template.description: Upgrading PostgreSQL from version {{currentVersion}} to {{targetVersion}}. Database size is {{databaseSize}}GB. Target downtime window is {{downtime}} minutes. Upgrade will use pg_upgrade for faster migration and include testing of deprecated features and query performance.
template.currentState: PostgreSQL {{currentVersion}} running on RDS with {{databaseSize}}GB of data. Current extensions: pg_stat_statements, pgcrypto, uuid-ossp. Applications use connection pooling via PgBouncer.
template.proposedState: PostgreSQL {{targetVersion}} with same extensions verified compatible. Using pg_upgrade for in-place upgrade. Planned downtime: {{downtime}} minutes during maintenance window.
template.trafficPatterns: 24/7 operation with peak hours 9 AM - 5 PM EST. Average 5000 transactions/minute. Read-heavy workload (80% reads, 20% writes). Critical for customer-facing applications.
